items.h: Shawn Dean Recalls Bringing Je'Von Evans To AEW Prior To WWE Career
items.p: Before joining WWE, wrestler Je'Von Evans took part in several dark matches for AEW, including a memorable moment with Satnam Singh.

items.h: AEW's Thunder Rosa Compares Working In The United States & Mexico
items.p: AEW wrestler Thunder Rosa has drawn parallels between wrestling in Mexico and the United States, discussing how tricky it is to balance the two.
